name: Cherry Trees: Diameter vs Volume
description: Trunk diameter (in) vs timber volume (cu ft) for 31 black cherry trees. IMS Ch. 25.
studyDescription: Measurements of 31 black cherry trees in the Allegheny National Forest, Pennsylvania. Researchers measured each tree's trunk diameter and timber volume as part of a forestry study. This is an observational dataset.

variableDescriptions.diam: Trunk diameter of the tree in inches, measured at 4.5 feet above ground (diameter at breast height)
variableDescriptions.volume: Usable timber volume of the tree in cubic feet

sourceDetail: OpenIntro IMS Ch. 25. Originally from Ryan, T.A., Joiner, B.L., and Ryan, B.F. (1976). Minitab Student Handbook. Duxbury Press.
